heroSubtitle: Generate professional administrative documents from anywhere. Fast, free and secure.
step1Text: Select the document type you want to create.
step2Text: Enter your information in the guided form.
step3Text: Get your PDF ready to print or send.
feature1Text: Generate your document in under 2 minutes.
feature3Text: From your phone, tablet or computer.
feature4Text: Your data is never stored on our servers.
legalText: Documents generated by Afridoc are provided for informational and drafting purposes only. Any fraudulent use, falsification or unlawful use of these documents is strictly prohibited and may result in criminal prosecution under applicable law. The user is solely responsible for the content entered and the use made of the documents produced.
aboutMission1: Afridoc is a free web application that allows all Malian and African citizens to easily generate their administrative documents, without having to go to a cyber café.
aboutMission2: We believe that every person should have access to the tools needed to create their official documents from home, their phone or anywhere.
aboutPrivacyText: No personal data is stored on our servers. Documents are generated on the fly and downloaded directly to your device.
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Afridoc
faqQ1: Is Afridoc really free to use?
faqA1: Yes, Afridoc is completely free. No registration, no payment, no subscription required. You can generate as many documents as you like.
faqA2: No. Afridoc does not store any personal data. The information you enter is used solely to generate your PDF, then discarded. No account is created.
faqQ3: Are the generated documents legally valid?
faqA3: Documents generated by Afridoc are professional templates. Their legal validity depends on their use, signatures applied and local legislation. For official acts, a visit to a competent authority may be required.
faqQ4: Which countries can I use Afridoc in?
faqA4: Afridoc is designed primarily for Mali and French-speaking Africa, but the documents can be adapted to any context.
faqQ5: What document formats can I generate?
faqA5: All documents are generated in PDF format, ready to print or send by email.
faqQ6: How do I report a problem or suggest an improvement?
faqA6: You can contact us via our GitHub repository. We welcome all improvement suggestions.
page404Text: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
footerText: Administrative document generation app for Mali and Africa
pageDesc: Generate your official administrative documents as PDF for free: CVs, letters, certificates, contracts and more.
aboutPageDesc: Discover Afridoc's mission: making administrative document generation accessible to everyone, for free.
faqPageDesc: Answers to frequently asked questions about Afridoc: cost, privacy, legal validity of documents.
